bash.label: Bash
bash.description: Route the current session to a local Bash terminal.

fish.label: Fish
fish.description: Route the current session to a local Fish terminal.

zsh.label: Zsh
zsh.description: Route the current session to a local Zsh terminal.

sh.label: sh
sh.description: Route the current session to a local POSIX shell.

ash.label: ash
ash.description: Route the current session to a local ash shell.

claude-code.label: Claude Code
claude-code.description: Route the current session to a Claude Code A2A bridge.

codex.label: Codex
codex.description: Route the current session to a Codex CLI A2A bridge.

qwen-code.label: Qwen Code
qwen-code.description: Route the current session to a Qwen Code A2A bridge.

gemini-cli.label: Gemini CLI
gemini-cli.description: Route the current session to a Gemini CLI A2A bridge.

iflow.label: iFlow
iflow.description: Route the current session to an iFlow CLI A2A bridge.

copilot-cli.label: Copilot CLI
copilot-cli.description: Route the current session to a Copilot CLI A2A bridge.

profiles.hint: Each profile value may contain label, transport (terminal or a2a), executable, agent_card_url, description, headers, accepted_output_modes, blocking and history_length. Example: {"bash": {"label": "Bash", "transport": "terminal", "executable": "bash"}, "codex": {"label": "Codex", "transport": "a2a", "agent_card_url": "http://127.0.0.1:41241/.well-known/agent-card.json"}}

require_admin.description: Only allow AstrBot administrators to use redirect targets

terminal_working_directory.description: Default working directory for new local terminal sessions

terminal_command_timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for each local terminal command

response_char_limit.description: Maximum number of response characters sent back to the chat

default_history_length.description: Default A2A task history length to request

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout used for agent card discovery and JSON-RPC calls

poll_interval_seconds.description: Polling interval for non-terminal A2A tasks

max_wait_seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for a task before returning the latest status
